title: guneria alborzensis
intro: Guneria alborzensis, also known as the White Mountain guneria, is a plant species native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Guneria alborzensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. Guneria alborzensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots are often used in Ayurvedic medicine to create medicinal preparations.
